sections.sectionTitle: Bildad in Pasian Thuman hi, Ci

verses.text: Tua ciangin Shuah gammi Bildad in dawng a
“Tua bang thu bang tanvei gengen ding a, bang tanvei paupau ding na hi hiam
Pasian in thutang a zanglo sa na hi hiam? Vanglianpa in thuman a zanglo sa na hi hiam
Na tate ama tungah khial a, amau' mawhnate amaute a tuaksak ahi hi
A hun lai-in Pasian zong in la, Vanglianpa' hehpihna ding thuum lecin
nang dikin thutang kisa mahmah na hih leh pelloin amah in nang hong en ding a, na thumanna tawh kizui-in thaman hong pia ding hi
Tua hi leh, na zawn' mahmah khit hangin a tawpna-ah na hau kik ding hi
“Khangluite' thu kantel in la, pute pate' tuahsa thute ngaihsun pha in
Eite pen zan mah mi ihi a, bangmah i thei kei hi. Leitunga i nuntakna pen niliim bang lel ahi hi
Amaute in nang hong hilhin, a thu hong genin, amau' phawksa thute hong gen ding hilo ahi hiam
“Ciknawng omlohna-ah laiphai kung po thei ahi hiam? Tui omlohna-ah pumpeeng pung thei ahi hiam
Ahi zongin tuate a pak kimlai a phuk hun nailopi-in kungno dang khempeuh sangin keu masa zaw hi
Pasian a mangngilhte tua bangmah ahi hi. Pasian a donlo mite' lametna a bei ta ahi hi
Ama kimuan'na maimom khau bang hi lel a, ama ki-upna maimom bu bang hi lel hi
A inn tungah kingam a, a inn hoi hi. A inn lencip a, ahi zongin kip zolo hi
“Amah pen nitaang sungah hoihtakin a khang kungno, a huan sungah a dawn hilhhelh kungno ahi hi
Ahi zongin suangtum lakah a zung a kivialgawp, suangtawphah a phukha zung a suak hi
Tua ciangin mi khatpeuh in a phung pan zungbawh a, ‘Cik mahin nang hong thei ngei peuhmah kei ing,’ ci-in a lawnkhia hi
Hih bang danin ama nuntakna bei a, lei sung panin kung dangte hong pokhia hi
“Theitel in; Pasian in cikmah hunin mawhbaanglo mite nilkhialo ding a, gamtatsia mite huh ngeilo ding hi
Na mukah lungdam nuihna hong omsak ding a, na kam sungah lungdam-a kikona hong omsak ding hi
Nang hong mudahte in maizumna ngah ding uh a, migilote' puanbuk maimang ding hi,” a ci hi.
